---
title: "Resources"
subtitle: "STAT 45203 · setup, references, and cross-cutting guides"
toc: false
---

::: {.source-basis}
Instructor-authored reference material. Open texts are cited by section only (map-don't-mine); licenses
are recorded on the [reading list](reading-list.qmd) and remain subject to confirmation.
:::

- **[Software setup (R · Posit · Quarto)](setup.qmd)** — the fastest path to a working environment,
  including the browser-only Posit Cloud route.
- **[Method-comparison guide](method-comparison-guide.qmd)** — a single table mapping each method to
  *what it estimates*, *what it assumes*, *what it protects against*, and *what it cannot prove*. The
  reference you'll reach for on the project.
- **[Notation & glossary](notation-and-glossary.qmd)** — the symbols and terms used across the notes, in
  one place, with plain-language definitions.
- **[Applied project guidance](project-guidance.qmd)** — the shape of the final robust-methods project:
  choosing a data setting, picking methods, investigating sensitivity, and writing it up. (Structure
  only — the graded checkpoints live in Blackboard.)
- **[Open readings & attribution](reading-list.qmd)** — the open textbooks and public-domain references
  this course draws on, with licenses and how each is used.
